context.description: Enhance DashboardPage.tsx with multi-bureau tradeline columns (Experian / Equifax / TransUnion side-by-side), dispute lifecycle status tracking, and manual dispute status updates. Implement dispute status state machine in backend.
acceptance_criteria: DashboardPage.tsx displays 3-column bureau view: each negative tradeline row shows Experian / Equifax / TransUnion presence with colored status badge
Dispute status badges: 7 states - pending (gray), letter_generated (blue), mailing_dispatched (purple), bureau_received (yellow), investigating (orange), resolved (green), denied (red)
Manual status update UI: each tradeline row has dropdown to manually update dispute status (calls PATCH /api/v1/tradelines/{id}/dispute-status)
backend: PATCH /api/v1/tradelines/{id}/dispute-status endpoint validates status transition, writes to disputes table, logs to notification_log (type='dispute_update')
Dashboard summary row: '5 negative items found | 2 letters generated | 1 mailed | 0 resolved' (counts from disputes table)
useDashboardData.ts uses TanStack Query with refetch interval of 30s for real-time status updates
Dashboard filter UI: filter by bureau (All / Experian / Equifax / TransUnion) and by status (All / pending / letter_generated / mailing_dispatched / resolved / denied) — filters applied client-side
Status change writes to status_history table: {dispute_id, old_status, new_status, changed_at, changed_by} via PATCH /api/v1/tradelines/{id}/dispute-status endpoint
Dashboard initial load completes in <2s for up to 50 tradelines (TanStack Query staleTime=30s to avoid redundant fetches)
Verify: Update dispute status via dropdown → badge color changes immediately → notification_log entry created → status_history row added
implementation_approach: Step 1: Read frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx and components/dashboard/ to understand current structure
Step 2: Read frontend/src/hooks/useDashboardData.ts and useDashboardQueries.ts for data fetching patterns
Step 3: Enhance tradelines query to group by (creditor, account_number) with bureau pivot
Step 4: Add bureau columns to dashboard table component
Step 5: Add DisputeStatusBadge component with 7 states and color mapping
Step 6: Add status dropdown to each tradeline row
pre_analysis: Read backend/api/v1/routes/tradelines.py - existing tradeline endpoints to extend
